name: secureedge
description: SecureEdge - Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:up && sleep 4 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
